title: AI Provider API Access and Model Loading Strategy
content: Define how the plugin should handle diverse API access patterns and model capabilities (standard vs. reasoning/thinking) across different AI providers.

rationale.anomaly: Specialized models (reasoning/thinking) require different API parameters (temperature, max_tokens, thinking blocks) which vary per provider and evolve rapidly.
rationale.approach: Evaluate different abstraction levels for managing provider-specific quirks and model capabilities.
